Around pond, more cattail in the shallow swampy area further back.
Most trees are oak, maple or pine types. There are some black cherry and beech behind the buildings in the unkept parts.
One patch of lemon balm west of the building. There's Wild rose, Blackberry, burdock and mugwort scattered all around the unmowed edges.
